note: ByteBudgetRead wraps each provider's raw Response before BufReader (Ollama:294, Anthropic:362, OpenAI:440). 8 MiB cap = 3 orders of magnitude over typical streaming response. EOF-at-exact-limit handled via 1-byte probe (avoids the naive false-positive at boundary). Errors propagate to emit_error via line.map_err. Cancel/cap race benign in both orders. 3 new tests assert specific outcomes (exact-at-EOF, over-limit, buffered-line cap).
